headline: Evaluating Universal Health Services (NYSE:UHS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent performance snapshot Universal Health Services (UHS) has drawn attention after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock down 1.6% over the past week and 16% over the past month. Looking further back, the stock has fallen 23.4% over the past 3 months and 35% year to date, while the 1 year total return is down 19.3%.
